criteria.description: plan-template.md replaces '## Parallel Work Analysis' with '## Implementation Concern Map' containing IC-## stubs with required fields
criteria.evidence: WP01 approved: src/doctrine/missions/software-dev/templates/plan-template.md updated; ripple check 0 hits for 'Parallel Work Analysis' in src/

criteria.description: Plan template includes explicit note that implementation concerns are NOT WPs and NOT executable units
criteria.evidence: WP01 approved: plan-template.md includes note 'Implementation concerns are NOT work packages and are NOT executable units'

criteria.description: /spec-kitty.plan prompt stop-point language references 'implementation concerns' and states /spec-kitty.tasks translates concerns into WPs
criteria.evidence: WP01 approved: src/doctrine/missions/mission-steps/software-dev/plan/prompt.md updated with implementation-concerns stop-point language

criteria.description: Built-in tasks step-contract 'outline' description references concern translation, not direct-from-plan-slices derivation
Legacy tasks prompt description header changed from 'Break a plan into work packages' to 'Translate implementation concerns into work packages'
WorkPackageEntry gains plan_concern_refs: list[str] with IC-\d{2} validator (re.ASCII) and cross_cutting: bool = False
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved (cycle 2): src/specify_cli/core/wps_manifest.py; 34 unit tests pass including Unicode-digit rejection (re.ASCII), backward-compat, validator edge cases
criteria.notes: Verified in WP02 review cycle 2 (approved); cycle 1 rejected for FR-009 violation which was fixed

criteria.description: generate_tasks_md_from_manifest() renders '**Plan Concerns**: IC-01, IC-03' per WP when plan_concern_refs non-empty; renders nothing when empty
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved: wps_manifest.py generate_tasks_md_from_manifest() updated; TestGenerateTasksMdPlanConcernRefs test class covers rendering order and empty-list case

criteria.description: tasks-outline prompt includes step requiring IC-## citation in plan_concern_refs or explicit cross_cutting: true declaration
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved: src/doctrine/missions/mission-steps/software-dev/tasks-outline/prompt.md section 4a added requiring IC citation before wps.yaml schema

criteria.description: tasks-packages prompt instructs populating plan_concern_refs in wps.yaml; explicitly warns NOT to add to WP prompt frontmatter (WPMetadata extra='forbid')
criteria.evidence: WP02 approved (cycle 2): tasks-packages/prompt.md removes frontmatter template for plan_concern_refs, adds explicit warning 'plan_concern_refs lives in wps.yaml only'
criteria.notes: Cycle 1 rejection was specifically this FR violation; cycle 2 fix confirmed valid

criteria.description: Existing missions with no plan_concern_refs in wps.yaml parse, render, and finalize without error or warning
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved: backward-compat tests in test_wps_manifest.py; 304 core tests pass with zero regressions; finalize-tasks warning is non-fatal

criteria.description: Many-to-many concern-to-WP mapping: one IC-## may appear in multiple WPs; one WP may list multiple IC-## refs
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved: test_wps_manifest.py covers multiple plan_concern_refs per WP and same IC-## in multiple WPs; no uniqueness constraint in field definition

criteria.description: Command-renderer snapshot tests pass; snapshots regenerated after template changes
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved: 8 skill snapshots regenerated in tests/specify_cli/skills/__snapshots__/; 65 twelve-agent baseline files regenerated; 102 snapshot tests pass

criteria.description: finalize-tasks emits non-fatal warning per WP missing both plan_concern_refs and cross_cutting: true; implemented via check_concern_refs_coverage() called from finalize_tasks command
criteria.evidence: WP03 approved (cycle 2): check_concern_refs_coverage() defined in wps_manifest.py, imported and called at mission.py:2172 inside finalize_tasks handler; warnings printed as yellow console messages; 28 unit tests pass
criteria.notes: Cycle 1 rejected for dead code (no callers); cycle 2 fix wired call into finalize-tasks
